# @jsondb-cloud/client

> Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for jsondb.cloud — a hosted JSON document database.

## Install

```bash
npm install @jsondb-cloud/client
```

## Quick Start

```typescript
import { JsonDB } from "@jsondb-cloud/client";

const db = new JsonDB({ apiKey: "jdb_sk_live_xxxx" });
const users = db.collection<{ name: string; email: string }>("users");

// Create
const alice = await users.create({ name: "Alice", email: "alice@example.com" });

// Read
const user = await users.get(alice._id);

// List with filters
const active = await users.list({ filter: { role: "admin" }, sort: "-$createdAt", limit: 10 });

// Update (partial)
await users.patch(alice._id, { email: "new@example.com" });

// Delete
await users.delete(alice._id);
```

## Configuration

```typescript
const db = new JsonDB({
  apiKey: "jdb_sk_live_xxxx", // Required
  project: "v1",              // Default: "v1"
  baseUrl: "https://api.jsondb.cloud",
  timeout: 30000,
  retry: { enabled: true, maxRetries: 3 },
  headers: {},
});
```

## API Overview

**CRUD:** `create`, `get`, `list`, `count`, `update`, `patch`, `jsonPatch`, `delete`
**Bulk:** `bulk`, `bulkCreate`
**Query Builder:** `where(field, op, value).orderBy().limit().offset().select().exec()`
**Schema:** `setSchema`, `getSchema`, `removeSchema`, `validate`
**Versions:** `listVersions`, `getVersion`, `restoreVersion`, `diffVersions`
**Webhooks:** `createWebhook`, `listWebhooks`, `getWebhook`, `updateWebhook`, `deleteWebhook`, `testWebhook`
**Import/Export:** `importDocuments`, `exportDocuments`
**Streaming:** `stream` (SSE real-time changes)

## Error Handling

All errors extend `JsonDBError` with `.code`, `.status`, `.details`.

```typescript
import { NotFoundError, ValidationError } from "@jsondb-cloud/client";

try {
  await users.get("missing");
} catch (err) {
  if (err instanceof NotFoundError) { /* 404 */ }
  if (err instanceof ValidationError) { /* 400 - err.errors has details */ }
}
```

Error classes: `NotFoundError` (404), `ValidationError` (400), `ConflictError` (409), `UnauthorizedError` (401), `ForbiddenError` (403), `RateLimitError` (429), `QuotaExceededError` (429), `DocumentTooLargeError` (413), `ServerError` (500).

## Full API Reference

See llms-full.txt for complete method signatures, parameters, types, and examples.

## Links

- Docs: https://jsondb.cloud/docs/sdks/node
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@jsondb-cloud/client
- GitHub: https://github.com/JsonDBCloud/node

## Related Packages

- `@jsondb-cloud/mcp` — MCP server for AI agents — https://www.npmjs.com/package/@jsondb-cloud/mcp
- `@jsondb-cloud/cli` — CLI tool — https://www.npmjs.com/package/@jsondb-cloud/cli
- `jsondb-cloud` (PyPI) — Python SDK — https://pypi.org/project/jsondb-cloud/
